AC:
Programmatic gates (all must pass):

1. FILES: `vox2stl/emacs/vox-mode.el` exists and sets `auto-mode-alist` for `\\.vox\\'`.
2. DELEGATION: mode commands for correct/mirror/check invoke `vox2stl/voxtool.py` (grep the .el for `voxtool.py`); no Elisp reimplementation of mirror glyph maps.
3. TOOLS: `voxtool.py` grows `reheader`, `sync-pads`, and `indent` (exact subcommand names may match Body; `--help` lists them).
4. PYTEST: `(cd vox2stl && make test)` passes, including new tests that cover:
   - `reheader` fixes height mismatch on a copy of `thermo/onboard/hardware/pico2w/hat/up-side.vox` (or a stripped fixture derived from it) so `height_rows == len(rows)` per layer;
   - `sync-pads --from=trace --to=base` on a fixture makes every trace `*`/`O` appear in base at the same design-window coordinates;
   - `indent --delta 1` then `indent --delta -1` round-trips `vox2stl/testdata/straight.vox` (file identical) and leaves `voxtool.py check` exit 0.
5. CHECK: after each transform test, `vox2stl/voxtool.py check <fixture>` exits 0 (use legal fixtures: `testdata/straight.vox`, `testdata/box_glyphs.vox`, `thermo/onboard/hardware/pico2w/hat/pico-side.vox`, `thermo/onboard/hardware/print-head-clean.vox`).
6. EMACS BATCH: `emacs --batch -L vox2stl/emacs -l vox-mode.el --eval '(progn (find-file "vox2stl/testdata/straight.vox") (vox-mode) (vox-mode-check))'` exits 0 (adapt command names to what shipped).
7. MIRROR PARITY: saving a buffer and running the mode's mirror command on a temp copy of `testdata/straight.vox` produces the same bytes as `voxtool.py mirror -out …` on that copy.

Done when 1–7 are green; no requirement that all thermo boards pass `check --all`.

Body.raw:
# Emacs mode for .vox editing (vox2stl)

## Goal
Ship a thin Emacs major mode for hand-editing HAT `.vox` files, with transforms that keep files legal for `vox2stl/voxtool.py check`. Prefer extending `voxtool.py` for anything that must stay bit-exact with Python validation; keep Elisp for UX and thin wrappers.

## Resources (read these first; do not invent format)
| Path | Why |
|------|-----|
| `vox2stl/README.md` | glyph / alias / mirror / correct contract |
| `vox2stl/constants.py` | `parse_layer_header`, `LayerHeader`, aliases, letter_style |
| `vox2stl/check_vox.py` | legality (geometry, labels, pads, intents) |
| `vox2stl/voxtool.py` | existing CLI: `check`, `correct`, `mirror`, `stl` |
| `vox2stl/testdata/*.vox` | tiny legal fixtures |
| `thermo/onboard/hardware/pico2w/hat/{up-side,pico-side}.vox` | real boards (pico-side currently `check`-clean) |
| `thermo/onboard/hardware/esp32s3/hat/{one-side,other-side}.vox` | keyword-style headers + known check failures |
| `thermo/onboard/hardware/print-head-clean.vox` | tiny base+trace pad example |
| `thermo/onboard/hardware/SKILL.md` | human layout rules (base vs trace chars) |

## Legal .vox constraints (MUST maintain)
Any mode command that rewrites a buffer/file must preserve these invariants. Gate every transform with `vox2stl/voxtool.py check <file>` (exit 0) on a fixture; do not weaken the checker.

### Header
- Form: `layer NAME (ARGS)` where ARGS are positional `offset, width, height` OR keyword form (`horizontal_offset=…, width_columns=…, height_rows=…`, optional `layer_thickness_mm=…`, `letter_style=…`). Parser: `parse_layer_header` in `constants.py`.
- Aliases: `offset`→`horizontal_offset`, `width`→`width_columns`, `height`→`height_rows`.
- Positionals must precede keywords. Unknown keys are illegal.
- `letter_style` only `positive` or `negative` (default from profile).
- **`height_rows` MUST equal the number of data rows** that follow that header until the next `layer` / EOF (blank and `#` lines are skipped by the reader; do not invent a different counting rule — match `check_vox.load_layers`).
- **All layers in one file MUST share the same `(offset, width, height)`** as the `trace` layer (`validate_layer_geometry`).

### Grid / windows
- Design window = characters `[offset : offset+width)` on each layer row.
- Checked window may include one char of padding left/right of the design window; only `ALLOWED_CHARS` (+ declared one-char aliases) may appear there.
- Base layer cells (design window): `X`, `*`, `O`, and optionally `a-z` labels. Trace: `.`, `*`, `O`, `a-z`, `-`, `|`, `+`, `/`, `\`, `<>^`, box-drawing, aliases.
- `*` = host pin through-pad; `O` = device leg through-pad. Adjacent pads do not auto-connect.

### Cross-layer agreement
- Left and right **row labels** on `trace` must match `base` (errors today).
- Trace `*`/`O` positions should match base pads (checker emits **warnings** today; mode sync should make them match exactly).
- `#` comments, `alias G -> | = GND`, `net alias`, and `# trace intents` blocks must survive transforms that do not intentionally edit them. **`mirror` already remaps `.cN` and intent endpoints** — do not reimplement.

### Encoding / line endings
- UTF-8. Preserve existing line endings when rewriting (see `split_line_ending` in `voxtool.py`).

## Elisp vs voxtool boundary
| Concern | Where | Why |
|---------|-------|-----|
| `font-lock`, imenu/layer nav, keymap, `.vox` auto-mode | **Elisp only** | UX; no legality risk |
| Insert empty layer skeleton / regenerate blank `.` or `X` grid | **Elisp OK** if it only writes chars + a header that already matches peer geometry; else call tool | Small; must still match shared geometry |
| Recalculate `height_rows` from actual rows | **Prefer new `voxtool` subcommand** (e.g. `reheader`); Elisp may call it | Easy to get row counting wrong vs `load_layers` |
| Indent / outdent (`horizontal_offset` ± N, rewrite left padding on every layer row) | **Prefer new `voxtool`**; Elisp thin wrapper | Label fit rules (`format_left_label`), must keep all layers aligned |
| L↔R flip | **Delegate to existing `voxtool.py mirror`** — never reimplement in Elisp | Glyph map, label swap, `.cN` / intent remap already correct |
| Shorthand → box glyphs | **Delegate to existing `voxtool.py correct`** | Canonical in `correct_vox_shorthand_text` |
| Transfer `*`/`O` from `trace` → `base` (punch holes into substrate) | **Prefer new `voxtool` (e.g. `sync-pads --from=trace --to=base`)**; Elisp wrapper | Must zip design windows by row/col; preserve non-pad base `X` |
| Transfer / prime pads `base` → `trace` | Same tool, opposite direction | Matches SKILL.md priming workflow |
| Validate | **Always `voxtool.py check`** | Single source of truth |
| STL | Out of scope for the mode (optional menu item calling `voxtool.py stl`) | Heavy; not needed for edit loop |

**Rule of thumb:** if the transform already exists or needs to stay identical to Python validation, put/keep it in `voxtool.py` and have Elisp `call-process` it on the buffer file (save → tool → revert). Only keep pure Elisp for display and for transforms that are trivial char grids with no comment/intent rewriting.

## Order of work (do in this order)
Work sequentially. Each section ends with a programmatic AC gate before the next.

### Section A — Mode skeleton (Elisp)
1. Add `vox2stl/emacs/vox-mode.el` (or `vox2stl/vox-mode.el`): `define-derived-mode`, `auto-mode-alist` for `\\.vox\\'`, basic font-lock (headers, comments, `*`/`O`, traces).
2. Commands that shell out: `vox-mode-check`, `vox-mode-correct`, `vox-mode-mirror` → `vox2stl/voxtool.py …` on `buffer-file-name`.
3. Document install: `(load "…/vox-mode.el")` in a short comment at top of the file (no new markdown doc unless asked).

### Section B — Header legality helper (voxtool first)
4. Add `voxtool.py reheader` (name OK if better): rewrite each layer header so `height_rows` == actual data row count (same counting as `load_layers`); leave offset/width/keywords alone unless inconsistent across layers (then fail).
5. Pytest on a temp copy of `up-side.vox` (currently fails: base has 26 rows vs declared 22) and on `testdata/straight.vox` (no-op).
6. Elisp `vox-mode-reheader` calls the tool.

### Section C — Layer generate / pad sync (voxtool)
7. Add `voxtool.py sync-pads --from={base,trace} --to={base,trace}`: for every design-window cell, if source is `*` or `O`, write that char into dest; do not invent traces; do not delete dest pads unless a flag says so (default: only upsert pads from source). Preserve row labels and comments outside the design window.
8. Pytest with `print-head-clean.vox` and/or a tiny synthetic fixture under `vox2stl/testdata/`.
9. Elisp wrappers for both directions.

### Section D — Indent / outdent (voxtool)
10. Add `voxtool.py indent --delta N` (N may be negative): adjust `horizontal_offset` by N on **every** layer header; shift the design window on every layer row by inserting/removing N spaces in the left margin without corrupting the design window or right-side labels/comments. Fail clearly if a left label no longer fits in the new offset.
11. Pytest round-trip: indent +1 then -1 is byte-identical (or check-equivalent) on `testdata/straight.vox` and `pico-side.vox`.
12. Elisp `vox-mode-indent` / `vox-mode-outdent`.

### Section E — Integration gate
13. Emacs `--batch` smoke: load mode, open `testdata/straight.vox`, run check command, expect success.
14. Manual/scripted: mirror via mode equals `voxtool.py mirror` on the same fixture (diff empty).

## Non-goals
- Fixing currently-illegal thermo boards (esp32 label mismatch, up-side row count) except as **fixtures** proving `reheader` / edits help.
- Reimplementing net/intent validation, STL, or mirror glyph tables in Elisp.
- Full circuit autorouter.

## Tracker choice
Single branch, sequential WorkItems (no subtodos). Near-head items are small; later ones stay as above until approached.

WorkItems.summary: A1: Add vox2stl/emacs/vox-mode.el skeleton (derived mode, auto-mode-alist, font-lock for headers/comments/pads/traces)
A2: Elisp wrappers call-process voxtool.py check|correct|mirror on buffer-file-name (save/revert); document load path in file header comment
B1: Implement voxtool.py reheader (height_rows := load_layers row count; preserve offset/width/kwargs; fail on cross-layer geometry mismatch)
B2: Pytest reheader on up-side.vox copy + no-op on testdata/straight.vox; wire Elisp vox-mode-reheader
C1: Implement voxtool.py sync-pads --from/--to for */O design-window upsert; preserve labels/comments outside window
C2: Pytest sync-pads using print-head-clean.vox or new testdata fixture; Elisp wrappers both directions
D1: Implement voxtool.py indent --delta N (all layer headers + row left margins; fail if left label no longer fits)
D2: Pytest indent +1/-1 round-trip on straight.vox and check-clean on pico-side.vox; Elisp indent/outdent
E1: emacs --batch smoke (load mode, open straight.vox, check) + mirror parity diff vs voxtool.py mirror
